destinations.evidence: Malformed precompile input turns the builder conversion into Err before any commitment transaction is created.
destinations.snippet:
validate_async_payload(async_call.precompile_address, input, MAX_SHORT_ASYNC_TTL_BLOCKS).map_err(|err| format!("invalid async commitment payload: {err}"))?;
try_decode_precompile_data(async_call.precompile_address, input).map_err(|err| format!("malformed async commitment input: {err}"))

destinations.evidence: When conversion fails, the payload builder skips the invalid short async transaction rather than creating async system state.
destinations.snippet: Err(reason) => { warn!(target: "ritual::async::payload_builder", ?tx_hash, async_call_count, reason, "skipping invalid short async transaction"); }

destinations.evidence: RPC admission also rejects malformed detected async payloads before pool insertion.
destinations.snippet:
validate_async_payload(...).map_err(|err| format!("payload validation failed for {}: {err}", metadata.address))?;
let decoded = try_decode_precompile_data(...).map_err(|err| format!("failed to decode precompile input: {err}"))?;

equivalence_argument: The current inspector may observe the raw precompile call, but malformed base request decoding prevents it from becoming an async commitment or valid pool admission, preserving the fail-closed behavior.
notes: Mapped in port through validation-before-commitment semantics.
rationale: The detection path now logs failure to extract precompile data and returns None when ExecutorRequest decoding fails. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: If decoding the base ExecutorRequest fields fails, async detection must return None and the transaction must not be considered an async precompile call.
suggested_falsification_tests: Provide malformed precompile input that reaches the async inspector but cannot decode as ExecutorRequest and assert detect_async_transaction returns None and no TxAsyncExec is created.
summary: Malformed executor request input cannot create async commitment state.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Pass malformed HTTP precompile input through RPC admission and payload building and assert admission rejects or the builder skips without creating a TxAsyncCommitment.
title: Malformed executor request is not async
